heroSubtitle: High-quality equipment for MMA, boxing, and wrestling for athletes who value protection, comfort, and the right choice without compromise.
One complect. One style. One ready-to-go: One complect. One style. One ready-to-go setup for serious training.
A specialized selection of original figh: A specialized selection of original fight gear sourced for MMA, boxing, and wrestling.
Our range is built to help athletes find: Our range is built to help athletes find the right equipment without guesswork.
We focus on gear that supports comfort,: We focus on gear that supports comfort, protection, and performance in every session.

faqText:
Everything you may need to know about
ordering, delivery, products, and customer
support. Can’t find what you’re looking for?
Yes, we focus on original fight gear for: Yes, we focus on original fight gear for MMA, boxing, and wrestling. Our selection is built around quality, authenticity, and equipment that meets real training needs.
How do I choose the right size?: How do I choose the right size?
Sizing may vary depending on the product: Sizing may vary depending on the product type and brand. If you are unsure, contact us before ordering and we will help you choose the right option.
How fast do you ship orders?: How fast do you ship orders?
We aim to process and ship orders as qui: We aim to process and ship orders as quickly as possible. In many cases, orders are dispatched the same day or within a short time after confirmation.
Can I ask for help before placing an ord: Can I ask for help before placing an order?
Yes. If you are not sure which gloves, a: Yes. If you are not sure which gloves, apparel, or protection you need, you can contact us and we will help you choose the most suitable option.
Do you offer delivery across Ukraine?: Do you offer delivery across Ukraine?
Yes, we provide delivery for customers a: Yes, we provide delivery for customers across Ukraine. Shipping details and timing may depend on your location and the delivery service.
What if the product does not fit?: What if the product does not fit?
If there is a problem with sizing, fit,: If there is a problem with sizing, fit, or the order itself, contact us and we will help resolve the issue as quickly as possible.
What types of gear do you offer?: What types of gear do you offer?
We offer equipment and apparel for MMA,: We offer equipment and apparel for MMA, boxing, and wrestling, including gloves, rashguards, shorts, protection, and accessories.
Sign in or create an account: Sign in or create an account
